mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO agent_workflow_node (agent_definition_id, node_id, agent_id, rag_enabled, knowledge_base_id, instruction, sub_engine, mcp_servers, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.agentDefinitionId}, #{item.nodeId}, #{item.agentId}, #{item.ragEnabled}, #{item.knowledgeBaseId}, #{item.instruction}, #{item.subEngine}, #{item.mcpServers}::jsonb, #{item.sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_definition_id, node_id, agent_id, rag_enabled, knowledge_base_id, instruction, sub_engine, mcp_servers, sort_order FROM agent_workflow_node WHERE agent_definition_id = #{agentDefinitionId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
